Cytomegalovirus (CMV) Tests

Cytomegalovirus (CMV) Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are cytomegalovirus (CMV) tests? 
Cytomegalovirus (CMV) tests check for signs of CMV in your blood, sputum, or other body fluids. CMV is a
virus in the herpes family. Other types of herpes viruses include the viruses that cause chickenpox Â and mononucleosis (mono) .
